steps.title: Find the plural subject
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is Such lists, which is plural. The words between commas are a modifier describing Shonagon, so they do not change the subject-verb agreement.

steps.title: Choose the plural verb
steps.content: The matching verb is the plural present-tense form that agrees with lists. Choice A is singular, Choice B is a singular past-progressive phrase, and Choice C is an infinitive rather than the main verb. The answer is D.
